text: CRWD: $5.25B ARR growing 24%. 115% net retention. 97% gross retention AFTER the biggest IT outage in history. Stock cratered 40% post-incident and is now up 50.54% YTD at $173.8B market cap. The market's memory is genuinely impressive.
